name: Salmon Salad with Oranges
recipeInstructions:
1. Turn salmon into a bowl and discard skin and bones. Break the salmon into bite-size pieces.
2. Add celery, onion, parsley, and olives to the salmon.
3. Mix together lightly and chill for at least 15 minutes.
4. Just before serving, peel oranges and remove white membranes.
5. Separate orange sections; set a few aside for garnish and cut the remaining sections in half.
6. Add the cut orange sections to the salmon mixture.
7. Lightly toss the salad with dressing.
8. Serves 2.
